level: sekundarna i tercijarna zdravstvena zaštita – akutno bolničko liječenje (DRG)
issuer: Fond za zdravstveno osiguranje Crne Gore (FZOCG)
supersedes: Cjenovnik br. 01-9124 of 25.12.2018 and amendments br. 01-6106 of 20.09.2019 (per Član 7)
notes: DRG = Diagnosis Related Groups — coefficient × base rate = price
Items grouped by MDC (Major Diagnostic Category) sections
Pre-MDC contains transplants, ECMO, and similar high-complexity procedures
Same item often appears in multiple severity variants (e.g. A06A/B/C/D for varying KK complications)
Final section 'Nepovezani sa DRG' (codes 801A/B/C) = procedures unrelated to principal diagnosis (AR-DRG MDC 24)
Document replaces Cjenovnik br. 01-9124 of 25.12.2018 and amendments br. 01-6106 of 20.09.2019 (per Član 7)
Applies to: Klinički centar CG, KBC Berane, KB Kotor, opšte bolnice, SB Vaso Čuković Risan, stacionari domova zdravlja (per Član 6)
